text: >> Hello, can you hear me? I'm Ethan from Nova Healthcare Effect. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that can help with out-of-pocket expenses for the rest of the $10,000, especially during the hospital's day. To see if you qualify for this, please confirm with a yes or no if you're under the age of 65. [ Inaudible Remark ] >> I think I didn't hear that. Are you under the age of 65? >> Your message, press 1 to mark your message urgent, press 2. To mark your message private, press 3. To send your message as is, press pound. >> I'm sorry, I didn't quite get that. >> Are you clear? >> Can you confirm if you are under the age of 65? >> Or add to your message, press 1. To mark your message urgent, press 2. To mark your message private, press 3. To send your message as is, press pound. [BLANK_AUDIO]
